title: worms zone
description: A fun and addictive game where players control a worm that must navigate through a maze filled with obstacles and enemies. The objective is to grow the worm by eating food and avoiding collisions with the walls and other worms. The game features multiple levels, power-ups, and challenges to keep players engaged.
tech: Canvas API (for rendering the game environment and characters)
Keyboard Events (for controlling the worm's movement)
LocalStorage (for saving high scores and game progress)
